## Outcome

Describe the user-visible result.

## Validation

- [ ] Python tests pass.
- [ ] Browser-core tests pass.
- [ ] Python and shell syntax checks pass.
- [ ] New behavior has focused regression coverage.

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, cookies, private prompts, personal data, machine identifiers, local memory, model weights, runtime builds, or generated audio are included.
- [ ] Network bindings remain IPv4 loopback-only unless an approved architecture decision says otherwise.
- [ ] New dependencies/models and their licenses are documented in `THIRD_PARTY.md`.
- [ ] The change has a clear rollback and preserves text chat when optional components fail.
